stemHtml:
Which of the following must Cockpit Voice Recorder (CVR) record?

  1. Flight data
  2. Voice communications of flight crew members on the flight deck using the public address system, if installed
  3. Voice communications transmitted from or received in the aircraft by radio
  4. Voice or audio signals identifying navigation or approach aids introduced into a headset or speaker
  5. Voice communications of flight crew members on the flight deck
  6. Voice communications of fight crew members on the flight deck using the aircraft's interphone system
  7. Data recording of flight and engine parameters
